# Yaroslav Kovalchuk — Product Designer

> Product designer with a background in building AI products from scratch. Currently designing conversion and engagement experiences for 55+ million users at Headway, the world's most downloaded book summary app.

## About

Yaroslav Kovalchuk is a product designer based in Europe. He co-founded and designed Quidget — an AI customer support platform — from zero to a live product used by thousands of businesses. He now works at Headway, focusing on onboarding, paywall, and core product experiences at scale.

Contact: hello@yaroslav.design
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/yaroslavdesign

## Case Studies

- [AI Agent Onboarding — Quidget](https://yaroslav.design/cs-quidget-ai-agent.html): Designing the onboarding flow for an AI agent builder. Reduced setup time and improved activation rates.
- [Application UI & UX — Quidget](https://yaroslav.design/cs-quidget-app.html): Full product design of the Quidget dashboard, web chat widget, and marketing site.
- [Remoter.me](https://yaroslav.design/cs-remoter.html): Designed a remote job board from scratch — brand, product, and web.
- [Headway](https://yaroslav.design/cs-headway.html): Designing for 55+ million users at the world's most downloaded book summary app. Case study in progress.
